title: Senior Teacher - Lido Learning - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Lido Learning - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
